name: Agent Inventory Audit
description: Generates a tenant-wide agent and app inventory report from Package Management API data. Produces an Excel audit workbook, risk-scored dashboard, and governance email.

triggers.description: Activates when user requests an agent or app inventory, audit, or listing
monthly-inventory-audit — Full tenant inventory audit on the 1st of each month

actions.name: run-inventory-audit
actions.description: Generate a complete tenant-wide agent and app inventory with risk scoring

inputs.name: scope
inputs.description: Scope: all, custom-agents, store-apps, or specific department

inputs.name: includeRiskScoring
inputs.description: Include risk classification for each agent

outputs.name: inventoryReport
outputs.description: Complete agent inventory with metadata and classifications

actions.name: export-audit-workbook
actions.description: Export the inventory audit as an Excel workbook

outputs.name: workbookUrl
outputs.description: URL to the exported Excel workbook

crossPracticeIntegrations.description: Inventory feeds CMDB; CMDB provides CI context for agents
New or unregistered agents may trigger change requests

hitlControls.reason: Audit reports sent to governance stakeholders require approval

knowledgeSources.description: Agent packages from Package Management API
Configuration items for cross-referencing agent infrastructure
